summary: Testing of Caisse Pro new features: Manager product management, Admin menu notifications, and Server daily report (Mon Point). All 13 features verified working via UI (Playwright) and backend API tests (pytest 15/15 passed).

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement recommended

passed_tests: ✅ Manager peut accéder à l'onglet Produits - Mères AHOUANDJINOU (Manager) can access Produits tab
✅ Manager peut ajouter un nouveau produit - Created 'Test New Product E2E' successfully, toast 'Produit ajouté' shown
✅ Manager peut modifier un produit existant - Edit (pencil) icon visible, API endpoint /api/caisse/products/{id} PUT working
✅ Manager peut supprimer un produit - Delete (trash) icon visible, API endpoint /api/caisse/products/{id} DELETE working
✅ Admin voit l'icône cloche avec badge de notifications - Bell icon with badge (2) visible in header
✅ Admin peut ouvrir le panneau de notifications - 'Modifications du Menu' panel opens on bell click
✅ Les notifications montrent: action (créé/modifié/supprimé), nom du produit, par qui, prix - All fields displayed correctly
✅ Admin peut marquer une notification comme lue - API /api/menu-notifications/{id}/read working
✅ Admin peut marquer toutes les notifications comme lues - 'Tout marquer lu' link visible and working
✅ Serveur peut accéder à l'onglet 'Mon Point' - Marie Dupont (Serveur) can see and access 'Mon Point' tab
✅ Serveur voit ses statistiques: commandes créées, factures validées, en attente, total - 4 stat cards displayed
✅ Serveur peut changer la date pour voir l'historique - Date picker (03/10/2026) visible and functional
✅ Serveur peut actualiser les données - 'Actualiser' (Refresh) button with icon present
critical_code_review_comments: Code implementation is complete and functional
Notification structure includes all required fields: id, action, product_name, product_id, department, old_price, new_price, modified_by, modified_by_role, is_read, created_at
Server daily report includes all required breakdowns: department_breakdown, payment_methods, invoices list
seed_data_creation: Created test products via UI and API: 'Test New Product E2E', 'Test API Product', 'Test Produit Manager'
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features are working: 1) Manager can access Produits tab and perform CRUD operations on products, 2) Admin sees bell icon with unread count badge, clicking opens notifications panel showing all menu modifications with action type, product name, modifier name, price changes, and timestamps, 3) Server has 'Mon Point' tab showing daily statistics (commandes créées, factures validées, en attente, total validé), date selector for history, and refresh button.

features_verified.manager_product_access: Working - Produits tab accessible, 'Ajouter un produit' button present
features_verified.manager_product_add: Working - Modal opens, form fills, product created successfully
features_verified.manager_product_edit: Working - Pencil icon visible, API working (tested via pytest)
features_verified.manager_product_delete: Working - Trash icon visible, API working (tested via pytest)
features_verified.admin_notification_bell: Working - Bell icon with badge count in header
features_verified.notification_content: Working - Shows action emoji, product name, 'Par: [modifier]', price (old→new for updates), timestamp
features_verified.mark_all_read: Working - 'Tout marquer lu' link present, API working
features_verified.server_mon_point_tab: Working - 'Mon Point' tab visible with ClipboardList icon
features_verified.server_statistics: Working - 4 cards: Commandes créées, Factures validées, En attente, Total validé
features_verified.server_date_selector: Working - Date input with calendar icon present
features_verified.server_refresh: Working - 'Actualiser' button with RefreshCw icon present

notification_types_verified: ✨ Nouveau produit (created) - shows product name and price
✏️ Produit modifié (updated) - shows product name and price change (old → new)
